meta.title: What the US Air Force is learning from the war in Ukraine
meta.description:
I recently sat down with General Kevin Schneider and Command Chief Master Sergeant Katie McCool, the command element of America’s Pacific Air Forces (PACAF). During our conversation, one of the topics I was particularly interested in was what lessons PACAF (and the Air Force as a whole) could learn from the ongoing conflict in Ukraine. 

Here's what they had to say. 

Huge thanks to the incredible Airmen and civilians out there at Joint Base Pearl Harbor-Hickam for all of their help and hospitality during my recent trip!

You can stay on top of all things PACAF by following them on social media:
PACAF Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PACAF/
PACAF Twitter/X: https://x.com/pacaf?lang=en
PACAF Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/pacific_air_forces/?ref=nf
PACAF YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@UCcOYSSBHoG1rSjQHjS8FMMQ
